title: Metric Wizard — Dashboard Analysis and Glossary Generation
story: As a data analyst, I want to select Salesforce dashboards and have the system analyze their metadata to auto-generate a business metrics glossary, so that I can rapidly build an initial set of metrics from my existing analytics assets.
description:
Implements the core Metric Wizard flow — a multi-step modal that guides the user through selecting Salesforce dashboards, fetching their metadata, and generating a metrics glossary via an external AI service.

**Step 1 — Dashboard Selection**: User selects up to 4 dashboards from a searchable list. Each dashboard can be previewed in a new window. Clicking 'Analyze Dashboards' triggers Salesforce API calls to fetch full dashboard metadata JSON, then extracts distinct report IDs and fetches each report's metadata.

**Step 2 — Review and Generate**: Displays the selected dashboards with their associated report names. User reviews and clicks 'Generate Business Metrics Glossary'. The system constructs a nested JSON payload containing the existing metrics dictionary, dashboard metadata, and report metadata, then POSTs it to a Zapier webhook that routes to a Python-based AI analysis service.

**Step 3 — Results**: Displays the generated metrics glossary (handled in a separate ticket).

Dashboard and report metadata blobs are persisted in the database for reuse.
acceptance_criteria: User can select up to 4 dashboards from a searchable list in the wizard modal
Each dashboard can be opened in a new window for verification
Clicking 'Analyze Dashboards' fetches full metadata from Salesforce for each selected dashboard
System extracts distinct report IDs from dashboard metadata and fetches each report's metadata
Step 2 displays the selected dashboards and their associated report names
Clicking 'Generate Business Metrics Glossary' constructs and POSTs a nested JSON payload to the webhook
Dashboard and report metadata are persisted as blobs in the database
ux_changes: Multi-step wizard modal (Step 1: dashboard selection with search, Step 2: review dashboards/reports and trigger generation, Step 3: results). Magic wand icon triggers the wizard.
middleware_changes: Salesforce API integration to fetch dashboard and report metadata. JSON construction service that assembles the nested payload from existing metrics, dashboard metadata, and report metadata.
data_model_changes: Dashboard and report metadata stored as JSON blobs in the respective database records for caching and reuse.
api_changes: Internal endpoints for dashboard metadata fetch, report metadata fetch, and payload POST to the external Zapier webhook.
implementation_notes: Initial Salesforce Analytics API calls for report metadata returned NOT_FOUND errors for some reports. Dashboard metadata is fetched via /analytics/dashboards/{id} endpoint. Report metadata uses /analytics/reports/{id}/describe. The Zapier webhook URL was updated during development. An external Python service (built by Anton) processes the JSON payload for AI-based metric extraction.
comment_summary: Developer built the three-step wizard UX, integrated Salesforce metadata fetching, and POSTed the nested JSON to Zapier. Encountered NOT_FOUND errors for some report IDs. Used sandbox account for testing dashboards. Webhook URL was swapped during development.
